chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA No. 593 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 09 & 14 2. For order on CMA No.2805 /2024 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 4. For order on CMA No.2806 /2024 (stay) 29.01.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for applicant This matter is pending since 2024 without any progress, even notice has not been sought/issued till date. Diary sheet demonstrates that on each occasion, time has been sought and same is the case today. On 28.11.2025, the following order was passed:- “Prima facie all five questions proposed for determination either agitate factual controversy and/or are merely argumentative. Counsel may seek instructions. To come up on 05.12.2025”. On subsequent date, the adjournment was sought and same was the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Ashraf
